evaluator: fresh independent Level 2 evaluator (Copilot CLI Chief)
summary: Full-epic F005 (cloudflare-vertical-slice) Level-2 close-out over merged main (slices S1-S4, HEAD 6f5e1e738168c72edc96cb81cfa668d550f8cd85). All four acceptance steps plus the global invariants independently and adversarially verified against a LIVE PostgreSQL stack on alternate ports (fresh DB, migrations 0001..0007). Offline gates green (test.ps1 425/48, check.ps1 -NodeAudit 8/8); live stack-smoke 15/15; integration suite 48 passed; ~100 independent live checks incl. probe_live.py 6/6 (contradiction->review, offer_version UPDATE+DELETE 23001, community WITHHOLD, both 0006 separation triggers 23001, positive control), read-API guardrail matrix 12/12, migration round-trip base->head drift==[] + 3 triggers, and full Step-4 browse over the nginx /api proxy + web SPA. Dependency-manifest diff across the F005 range is EMPTY. F005 flipped to passes:true.

acceptance_steps.name: cloudflare_scans_deterministic_quota_extraction
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Run Cloudflare scans and deterministic quota extraction.
evidence: runner --publish on a FRESH DB extracted official Workers+Pages HTML fixtures -> published=2; raw SQL: 1 provider, 2 services, 2 offers, 2 immutable offer_versions, 17 quotas, official evidence linked to each version (offer_version_id non-null), 2 published 'added' change_events, 0 pending reviews.

Deterministic extraction is reproducible (stable content_hash); each offer Z0-classified Z0_TRUE_FREE with human-readable reasons via the S2 gated publication path (confidence>=0.90 + all hard conditions).
The 3 fixture-absent sources (changelog RSS, pages-pricing, docs-mcp) fail-isolate per-source via SAVEPOINT (runner exit 1) and are not defects; workers/pages publish cleanly.

acceptance_steps.name: repeat_scans_no_false_changes
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Verify repeat scans do not create false changes.
evidence: Immediate re-run: scan-level changes=0 for both sources; provider/source sync unchanged (created=0/updated=0/unchanged=5).
Publish-level: re-publishing identical facts -> published=0, unchanged=1 per offer; offer/offer_version/change_event counts unchanged at 2/2/2.

content_hash covers stable material facts only (offer_type, requires_card, has_paid_dependencies, exhaustion_behaviour, quotas), excluding time-varying confidence/freshness -> identical inputs append NO new OfferVersion.

acceptance_steps.name: changed_and_contradictory_evidence_paths
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Exercise changed and contradictory evidence paths.
evidence: Material change: edited Workers fixture (requests_per_day 100,000->200,000/day) appended a NEW append-only OfferVersion v2 (v1 100,000 retained immutably) + a PUBLISHED 'modified' change_event (previous_version_id=2, new_version_id=3, materiality material); Pages unchanged.

Contradiction (probe_live.py, rolled back): two official sources contradicting on a material fact (requires_card) -> a PENDING ReviewItem; publish_candidate returned decision=review, version_created=False, OfferVersion count UNCHANGED (ZERO auto-published), pending ReviewItem still stands (never auto-resolved, never published).

acceptance_steps.name: browse_public_provider_experience
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Browse category states, offers, evidence, confidence, history, completeness, and freshness.
evidence: Over the nginx /api proxy (port 8090): /catalogue/providers -> Cloudflare completeness 1.0/freshness 1.0/2 published offers; /category-states -> Pages+Workers, both Z0_TRUE_FREE, confidence label 'high', status active.

/offers/{id} -> offer_type always_free, zero_cost_class Z0_TRUE_FREE, 4 plain-language Z0 reasons, quotas, confidence LABEL primary with numeric score+signals ONLY inside 'advanced' (D039); /evidence -> official=true real Cloudflare URL + content_hash + snapshot provenance linked to offer_version_id; /history -> append-only versions + published 'added' change_events.
S4 web SPA served (root 200, #root, production bundle 200) with API base const '/api' and 13 /catalogue references -> the page renders the live API data end-to-end.

rubric_criteria.name: functional_correctness
rubric_criteria.evidence: All four acceptance steps verified end-to-end on a live stack plus ~100 independent live checks (probe_live 6/6, read-API 12/12, migration round-trip, Step-4 browse + SPA).

rubric_criteria.name: data_and_evidence_integrity
rubric_criteria.evidence: offer_version immutability rejects UPDATE and DELETE (23001); append-only versioning with published change_events; official evidence linked to each version; both 0006 separation triggers reject boundary crossings (23001); all verified adversarially via raw SQL.

rubric_criteria.name: zero_cost_safety
rubric_criteria.evidence: Publication is deterministic, official-evidence-only, no LLM/network in loop; contradiction/uncertainty->REVIEW, unofficial/unevidenced->WITHHOLD; 'unknown is better than guessed' upheld; Z0_TRUE_FREE genuinely official-evidence-backed (product-truth).

rubric_criteria.name: security_privacy
rubric_criteria.evidence: Read-API is GET-only (POST/PUT/DELETE->405); hostile slugs rejected (UPPER->422, url-like/traversal->404, unknown->404) so no user-controlled-URL/SSRF surface; detect-secrets/pip-audit/npm-audit green.

rubric_criteria.name: portability
rubric_criteria.evidence: Dependency-manifest diff across the whole F005 range (dafbd89..6f5e1e7) is EMPTY; requirements-sync gate green; PostgreSQL the only mandatory stateful service.

rubric_criteria.name: product_truth_no_unsupported_claims
rubric_criteria.evidence: The Cloudflare Z0_TRUE_FREE 'truly free' claim is official-evidence-backed (official Cloudflare evidence URL + snapshot + deterministic reasons); community sources can never publish; no manufactured free claim.

rubric_criteria.name: regression_safety
rubric_criteria.evidence: test.ps1 425/48, check.ps1 -NodeAudit 8/8, live stack-smoke 15/15, integration suite 48 passed; migrations 0001..0007 reversible with zero drift and all 3 triggers reinstalled; F000-F004 baselines unaffected.

command_results.dependency_manifest_diff_f005_range: EMPTY across dafbd89..6f5e1e7 (git diff --stat on pyproject.toml/requirements*/package.json/package-lock.json shows no change); no new runtime or npm dependency introduced by any F005 slice.

command_results.scripts_stack_cycle: exit 0; docker compose down --volumes -> up --build on alt ports (POSTGRES_PORT=55432/API_PORT=8010/WEB_PORT=8090); services healthy; migrations 0001..0007 applied on fresh DB; stack-smoke 15/15 PASS.
command_results.pipeline_drive: runner --publish run1 published=2 (Workers+Pages) on fresh DB; run2 idempotent published=0/unchanged for both, scan changes=0.
command_results.integration_suite_live: exit 0; 48 passed (46 + 2 stack-health with ATLAS_STACK_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8010) against live PostgreSQL.
command_results.adversarial_probe_live: exit 0; probe_live.py 6/6 PASS (Step-3b contradiction->review + ZERO new version; offer_version UPDATE+DELETE 23001; community WITHHOLD; 0006 trigger A + trigger B 23001; positive official control allowed) — all inside a rolled-back transaction leaving the live catalogue untouched.
command_results.read_api_guardrails: 12/12 over the nginx /api proxy: GET collection/detail 200; POST/PUT/DELETE 405; UPPER slug 422; url-like SSRF + path-traversal + unknown 404.
command_results.adversarial_probe_migration_roundtrip: exit 0; migration_roundtrip.py PASS (downgrade-to-base drops all domain tables; upgrade-to-head recreates them; compare_metadata drift == []; all 3 triggers trg_offer_version_immutable/trg_candidate_official_source/trg_evidence_official_candidate reinstalled).

known_issues_or_risks: The Cloudflare example config declares 5 sources but only workers-limits and pages-limits ship HTML fixtures; the other 3 (changelog RSS, pages-pricing, docs-mcp) fail-isolate per-source via SAVEPOINT so the runner CLI exits 1 while still committing the successful offers. This is expected offline-fixture behaviour, not a defect, and does not affect any acceptance step.
candidate rows accumulate per scan (pre-publication artifacts); idempotency is enforced at the OfferVersion/ChangeEvent level (the published surface), which is correct.
recommendation: Accept F005 as passing at commit 6f5e1e738168c72edc96cb81cfa668d550f8cd85. All four acceptance steps and the global invariants are independently and adversarially verified at the required Level 2 on a live stack; F005.passes set to true. This ledger change is committed on branch stsyg-f005-fullepic-closeout for the orchestrator to open + merge (evaluator does not open or merge the PR).
